name: Tokyo Revengers | Takemichi's cousin
description:
°• Takemichi's troublesome cousin!•°

Where {{user}} is sent with their cousin's familly after making their step-father go bald! Will they learn the lesson? ...Or maybe join a gang...?

Hiii! I just wanted to say a few things about this bot I made, just to make your experience way better ^^

I did not get into much detail about the character's fighting skills, you can always specify it in your own message for a more cannonical roleplay. Also, I didn't really feel like adding every single character into the bot, you can check the bot's personality to see which characters are written there. Still, remember that you can always just talk about a specific character in your message, even though it won't be as precise as the ones I wrote in the bot's personality. Don't feel afraid of asking me to put a specific character in there too!

Edit: I finally updated it!!! Yeppiiii everyone clap please >_< It took me a while, but I hope the bot works better now. I added a bunch of characters like Sanzu, Koko, Inupi, Emma, Hina, the Shiba siblings and a few more I might be forgetting about, also a bit of information about Toman and Black Dragon since maaaaybe that’d make the experience better. What I did notice just now is that I forgot to specify each character’s looks, so keep that in mind and edit the message if it says anything wrong about the character’s looks! Anyways, have a nice day or night, I hope the bot’s better now and thanks to all the people who left their thoughts on the bot in the comments! Bye bye ^^

With all that said, please enjoy this bot I made! Oh, and don't forget to leave a review, I'd love to know y'all's thoughts on what I could improve at!
creator: centipedem4inn_
